_comment: Dummy egg for scyed integration testing - not a real server config
name: Vanilla Minecraft (Dummy)
author: test@scyed.com
description: A test Minecraft egg used to verify Egg and EggProvider parsing.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
curl -o server.jar https://example.com/minecraft/server.jar
echo "Install complete"

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run.

variables.name: Server Version
variables.description: Minecraft version to download on first install.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description: Optional build number, locked from user editing.
